name: Alchemix
description: Alchemix is a self-repaying DeFi protocol that allows users to take out interest-free, non-liquidating loans against yield-bearing collateral. Users deposit assets such as ETH, DAI, USDC, or USDT into yield-bearing vaults, and the generated yield automatically repays the loan over time. The protocol issues synthetic alAssets (alUSD, alETH) representing future yield, and provides a Transmuter mechanism to stabilize alAsset prices by gradually exchanging alAssets for underlying collateral. Alchemix operates on Ethereum Mainnet, Optimism, and Arbitrum, with V3 in active development targeting 90% LTV and Meta-Yield Tokens.

itemListElement.name: Alchemix Smart Contract API
itemListElement.description: The primary developer interface for Alchemix is its on-chain smart contracts deployed on Ethereum Mainnet, Optimism, and Arbitrum.

itemListElement.name: Alchemix Subgraph API
itemListElement.description: Alchemix uses The Graph protocol to index on-chain events and expose yield data, harvest history, transmuter APR, and vault position data via GraphQL.

itemListElement.name: Alchemix Protocol Analytics API (DeFiLlama)
itemListElement.description: DeFiLlama provides a free, public REST API for Alchemix protocol analytics including TVL history, fee revenue, chain breakdowns, and token data.

itemListElement.name: Alchemix Token Price API (CoinGecko)
itemListElement.description: CoinGecko provides real-time and historical price data for all Alchemix protocol tokens including ALCX, alUSD, and alETH.

itemListElement.name: Alchemix Yield Snapshot Storage API (Pinata/IPFS)
itemListElement.description: Alchemix stores yield historic snapshots and transmuter APR data on IPFS via Pinata.
